title: aristolochia longa subsp. atlantica
intro: Aristolochia longa subsp. atlantica, also known as the Atlantic birthwort, is a species of flowering plant in the Aristolochia genus. This perennial plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The Atlantic birthwort has been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and supporting the digestive system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to leverage its medicinal properties.
